document_info.document_type: Fleet schedule and motor vehicle reports

concerns: Motor Vehicle Reports show 35 of 40 drivers are not clear: 32 with minor violations, 2 with major violations, and 1 with accident status.
Motor Vehicle Reports list 39 total violations and 40 total accidents.
Two drivers have major violations: Scott Murphy and Jack Reed.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: No insurance loss history or claims narrative was provided. Motor Vehicle Reports list 40 total accidents among the scheduled drivers.
positives: Fleet schedule lists 37 total units, including 24 powered vehicles and 13 trailers.
29 of 37 scheduled vehicles are model year 2023 or newer.
Driver roster lists 40 drivers with experience ranging from 4 to 33 years; 35 drivers have at least 10 years of experience.
Five drivers have clear Motor Vehicle Report status.
